meaning: 暗黑破坏神,一个著名游戏的名称,又称恐惧
examples: After designing Insaniquarium and working on Diablo 3 with Blizzard, what made you decide that your next project would be a tower defense game?
Even here a red Lamborghini Diablo sports car attracts covetous stares.
Screenwriter Diablo Cody's use of slang is one of the most memorable elements of the script.
Diablo II, which launched in summer 2000, sold 4 million copies in six months.
Sterne Agee analyst Arvind Bhati believes Diablo III will sell 3.5 million copies this year.
